tracks.name: Prism Parkway
tracks.character: A glass road refracted across the sky — no guardrails, all rainbow.

tracks.name: Molten Keep
tracks.character: A lava-flooded castle where the drawbridge is optional and so is survival.

tracks.name: Sundae Speedway
tracks.character: A banked oval of fudge and sprinkles. Watch the cherry chicane.

tracks.name: Haunted Manor Loop
tracks.character: Candle-lit corridors, a ballroom hairpin, and doors that choose sides.

tracks.name: Cloudline Circuit
tracks.character: Gondola cables and cumulus banking high above the weather.

tracks.name: Jungle Falls
tracks.character: Waterfall switchbacks behind the cascade — grip is a rumour.

tracks.name: Neon Harbor
tracks.character: A midnight dockside street circuit lit entirely by signage.

tracks.name: Glacier Run
tracks.character: A bobsled chute carved through blue ice. Braking is theoretical.
